coreMeaning.en: a device producing rapid flashes of bright light

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: strobe → 来自stroboscope缩写，频闪灯光效果

coreMeaning.en: an instrument for viewing rotating objects by intermittent illumination

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: strobo(旋转)+scope(观察) → 频闪观察仪

coreMeaning.en: past tense of stride; walked with long steps

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: stride → strode，不规则过去式，大步迈进

coreMeaning.en: a sudden medical attack; a single movement; a swimming motion

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: stroke → 联想脑中风stroke和游泳划水stroke
stroke + d → 已轻抚
stroke + s → 多次中风；多击
stroke + ing → 正在轻抚
stroll → 联想'随溜'，随意漫游溜达
stroll + ed → 曾漫步

coreMeaning.en: a baby carriage; one who strolls

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: stroll + er → 推婴儿车漫步的人；婴儿车
stroller + s → 多辆婴儿车
stroll + ing → 正在漫步
stroll + s → 他/她漫步
strong → 联想力量strong，如钢铁般强健
strong(强)+arm(手臂) → 强壮的手臂 → 强制手段

coreMeaning.en: a small secure box for valuables

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: strong(坚固)+box(箱) → 坚固的箱子 → 保险箱
strongbox + es → 多个保险箱
strong + er → 更强壮
strong + est → 最强壮

coreMeaning.en: a fortified place; a place where a belief is strongly supported

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: strong(坚固)+hold(持守) → 坚固持守的地方 → 要塞

coreMeaning.en: fortified places or centers of support

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: stronghold + s → 多处要塞
strong + ly → 强烈地
strong(坚固)+rooms(房间) → 坚固的保险室

coreMeaning.en: a stanza; a part of an ode sung while moving one way

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: strophe → 来自希腊语strophein(转向)，古希腊合唱队边唱边转向
strophe + s → 多个诗节

coreMeaning.cn: 暴躁的；难相处的（英式口语）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: stroppy → 联想'激动倔强'，英式俚语暴躁的
stroppy + er → 更暴躁
stroppy + est → 最暴躁

coreMeaning.en: a strip for sharpening a razor; a fit of anger

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: strop → 联想磨刀带strop，反复打磨
strop + ped → 已在磨刀带上磨刃
strop + ping → 正在磨刀
strop + s → 多条磨刀带

coreMeaning.en: past tense of strive; made great efforts

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: strive → strove → striven，不规则过去式，奋力努力

coreMeaning.en: past tense of strike; hit or affected

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: strike → struck，不规则过去式，打中了

coreMeaning.en: a soft metallic chemical element, symbol Sr

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: strontium → 以苏格兰地名Strontian命名，发现地

coreMeaning.en: of or relating to strophes; repeating the same music

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: strophe + ic → 有诗节形式的；分节的

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: str(string) + len(length) → 字符串长度函数
